visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic bottle with water and a blue cap, located behind the soda cans.
A red Coca-Cola soda can located in front of the water bottle.
A green Sprite soda can located to the left of the red can, also in front of the water bottle.
The wooden shelf the objects are resting on.
A brown paper envelope standing behind the objects.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is directly in front of the water bottle, blocking the robot's access to its graspable area.
The green soda can is also in the foreground and must be removed to ensure a clear path for the robot arm.
The path to the water bottle is now clear of obstructions.
